title: JSON Schema (embed.FS) + gojsonschema validator
acceptance_criteria: JSON Schema (draft-07) for Item committed under internal/domain/schema/.
Schema embedded via embed.FS so the binary has no runtime asset deps.
Validate(item) returns nil for the §5 fixture and ErrSchemaInvalid (wrapped) with field-path detail for mutated invalid versions.

Forward-version guard: items whose schema_version is GREATER than the binary's CurrentSchemaVersion are rejected with a wrapped ErrSchemaInvalid carrying a clear message ("item written with schema_version=N; this binary supports up to M; please upgrade the task CLI"). This prevents the multi-VM poisoning case where Agent A on a newer binary writes schema_version=2 and Agent B on an older binary reads it.
Tests assert each required field's absence triggers a validation error AND that schema_version > current produces the upgrade-prompt error.
